problem id: c39705cd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) AND SHR(3)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00001100
  10010111 -> 00011001
  00110010 -> 00000011
  00111000 -> 00000011
  11000011 -> 00011100
  00011001 -> 00000001
  11010100 -> 00001101
  00110100 -> 00000011

query: 01101100
predicted answer: 00000110
